name: chr4_centromere
description: Drosophila melanogaster centromere/pericentric heterochromatin block: chr4 proximal heterochromatin h61-h62. AATAT-rich, the 'dot chromosome' is essentially fully heterochromatic by mass but has ~80 expressed genes embedded.. Drosophila centromeres are built from heterogeneous islands of satellites (359-bp, dodeca, AAGAG, AATAT) interspersed with retrotransposon insertions; no canonical higher-order alpha-satellite-like structure. Most of the proximal heterochromatin is assembled only as 'Het' contigs in BDGP6.46, not anchored to the euchromatic arm assembly.
expected_copy_count: mostly satellite tandem repeats + dispersed TEs; centromere proper is ~420 kb of complex DNA (Sun et al. 2003)
